news.t: Qualcomm AI Hype Could Make This ETF Worth a Trade

overview.description: The Direxion Daily QCOM Bear 1X ETF (QCMD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the QUALCOMM Incorporated index. The fund provides inverse (-1x) exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of QUALCOMM, Inc. stock. QCMD was launched on Jun 25, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Qualcomm AI Hype Could Make This ETF Worth a Trade
data.text: Shares of semiconductor maker Qualcomm (QCOM) are higher by 30% over the past year, but more impressive is a 45.61% surge over the past month — a period including the company's latest earnings update....
